title: Sim ERC20.balanceOf via dexe_sim_calldata (read-only eth_call)
notes: Phase v0.5 — exercises dexe_sim_calldata against the active chain's first allowlisted token. balanceOf is a guaranteed-non-reverting view, so success must be true and returnData must decode to a 32-byte uint256.

successCriteria.check: sim.returnData starts with 0x and is 66 chars long (32-byte uint256)
